nodes.label: Oasis of Change Icon Mark (SVG)
nodes.description: Standalone icon/emblem for Oasis of Change. Square-format SVG (860x900px viewBox). Complex organic mark featuring nature-inspired imagery — likely a tree, leaf, or circular growth motif — rendered with multi-stop linear gradients. Dominant palette: forest green (#2f8b3b), bright green (#3bb63e), with gradient transitions across the ~23–26% red, 67–70% green, 29–33% blue range. Accent colors include deep blue (#3246a1) and sky blue (#4493d6), suggesting water or sky elements consistent with 'oasis' imagery. Highly detailed vector artwork with multiple clip paths and gradient definitions.
nodes.color_palette_description: Forest greens (primary), bright emerald greens, deep blue and sky blue accents

nodes.label: Oasis of Change Official Wordmark (SVG)
nodes.description: Full horizontal wordmark for Oasis of Change. Wide-format SVG (6000x1194px, viewBox 4500x895). Combines the icon mark in the left portion (~0–900px range) with the full brand name 'OASIS OF CHANGE' as 15 white-filled letter path groups (transform positions 1059–3755) against a colored background band. Typography rendered as outlined paths — all-caps, wide-set display lettering. Colors: white letterforms on colored ground; green tones (#2f8b3b, #3bb63e) in icon section; blue (#3246a1) for organic connecting element; dark gray (#545454) for secondary elements; sky blue (#4493d6) accent. The wordmark is fully vectorised with no embedded fonts.
nodes.color_palette_description: White letterforms on green/blue colored band; forest green icon; dark gray and blue accents
nodes.typography_style: All-caps display sans/slab, wide tracking, bold weight, rendered as outlined paths

nodes.label: Web Ready Logo Badge (WebP)
nodes.description: Square web-optimized badge (~500x500px). Deep forest green background with white 'Web Ready' text in a rounded serif / slab-serif typeface — warm, friendly, and organic in character. A small white seedling/sprout icon (two leaves on a stem) sits above the letter 'y' in 'Ready', reinforcing the growth and nature theme. The typography has a hand-crafted, approachable quality consistent with the Oasis of Change brand ethos. Used as a program or product sub-brand badge.
nodes.color_palette_description: Deep forest green background (~#1a6b2b or similar), pure white text and icon
nodes.typography_style: Rounded slab-serif, mixed case, bold weight, approachable and organic feel
nodes.icon_element: White seedling/sprout (two leaves on stem) above letter 'y'

nodes.label: Brand Color: Forest Green (#2f8b3b)
nodes.description: Primary brand green — deep forest green used in both the icon mark and full wordmark. Hex #2f8b3b. Represents nature, growth, sustainability.

nodes.label: Brand Color: Bright Green (#3bb63e)
nodes.description: Secondary brand green — bright emerald green used as accent/highlight in the icon mark and wordmark. Hex #3bb63e. Used for lighter areas in gradient transitions, suggesting vitality and growth.

nodes.label: Brand Color: Deep Blue (#3246a1)
nodes.description: Blue accent — deep indigo-blue used in both icon mark and official wordmark. Hex #3246a1. Likely represents water (oasis theme) or sky. Appears in organic path elements.

nodes.label: Brand Color: Sky Blue (#4493d6)
nodes.description: Light sky blue accent. Hex #4493d6. Used in gradient sections of icon and wordmark, suggesting open sky, hope, or water.

nodes.label: Oasis of Change Brand Identity
nodes.description: Overarching brand identity for Oasis of Change. Visual language is nature-forward, growth-oriented, and earthy: forest greens as dominant palette, blue water/sky accents, white clean lettering. Icon combines organic natural forms (trees, leaves, sprouts) with the concept of transformation. Typography is bold, approachable, and all-caps in the primary wordmark, with a warmer slab-serif in sub-brand badges. The brand communicates environmental stewardship, personal and community transformation, and a connection to nature.

nodes.label: Brand Motif: Seedling / Growth Icon
nodes.description: Recurring brand motif: seedling with two leaves on a stem. Visible explicitly in the web-ready-logo.webp as a white sprout icon. This growth motif is consistent with the organic nature of the icon mark paths and the brand name 'Oasis of Change'. Represents new beginnings, nurturing, environmental growth, and personal transformation.

nodes.label: Brand Typography: Display All-Caps Sans/Slab
nodes.description: Primary brand typography style for official wordmark: all-caps, bold, wide-tracked display letterforms rendered as outlined SVG paths. The letterforms suggest a geometric or humanist sans-serif or slab-serif typeface — clean, impactful, and confident. The sub-brand (Web Ready badge) uses a warmer, more rounded slab-serif, indicating typographic flexibility within the brand system.

edges.note: Icon mark is embedded as the left portion of the full wordmark SVG; same clip path IDs (e.g. #48c7d8a31b) appear in both files
Same forest green palette, same seedling motif, same approachable brand tone as main brand assets
Both are green palette variants used together in gradient transitions within the same logo
Both blue tones used in same logo assets — likely represent water/sky (oasis theme)
Seedling icon explicitly visible in web-ready-logo.webp
